2026-04-17T15:15:00.3097248Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-17T15:15:00.3097684Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-17T15:15:00.3098056Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-17T15:15:00.3098357Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T15:15:00.3098593Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T15:15:00.3098754Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-17T15:18:15.6042473Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-17T15:16:08.202047849Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58294,\"title\":\"[Advisor] Docs: Update README for beta.6 new resource types and add inline code examples\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/`\\n**Triggered by:** [REDACTED] (PR #58281) by `@ArthurMa1978`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nRelease 1.0.0-beta.6 (2026-04-17) upgraded the API version to `2025-05-01-preview`, adding new resource types to the generated code:\\n- `AdvisorAssessment` (`AdvisorAssessmentResource`, `AdvisorAssessmentCollection`)\\n- `AdvisorResiliencyReview` (`AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource`, `AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection`)\\n- `AdvisorTriage` (`AdvisorTriageResource`, `AdvisorTriageCollection`)\\n- `AdvisorTriageRecommendation` (`AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource`, `AdvisorTriageRecommendationCollection`)\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- **New resource types undocumented:** The new `AdvisorAssessment`, `AdvisorResiliencyReview`, `AdvisorTriage`, and `AdvisorTriageRecommendation` resources from the `2025-05-01-preview` API version are not mentioned anywhere in the README\\n- **No inline code examples:** The `Examples` section only links to a generic samples page (`(aka.ms/redacted) — there are no concrete `C# Snippet:` examples in the README, even though `tests/Samples/` contains multiple fully-working sample files\\n- **No snippet wiring:** None of the files in `tests/Samples/` contain `#region Snippet:` / `#endregion` markers, so the `Update-Snippets.ps1` tooling cannot inject them into the README\\n- **Thin Key concepts section:** The `Key concepts` section only links to general Azure SDK docs. It should briefly describe the key Advisor resources the library manages (recommendations, configurations, suppression contracts, assessments, triage, resiliency reviews)\\n- **Non-standard README structure:** The README has an extra `Documentation` section not present in the canonical template, and `Key concepts` / `Examples` sections do not follow the depth expected by the standard pattern\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/README.md` — **edit**\\n\\nReplace the thin `Key concepts` section with one that describes each major resource type:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\nThe `Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor` library provides access to the following top-level resource types:\\n\\n| Resource type | Description |\\n|---|---|\\n| `AdvisorRecommendationResource` | A personalized best-practice recommendation for an Azure resource (cost, security, reliability, performance, operational excellence) |\\n| `AdvisorSuppressionContractResource` | Suppresses a recommendation for a specified duration so it is no longer surfaced |\\n| `AdvisorAssessmentResource` | An assessment generated by Advisor against an Azure resource (preview API `2025-05-01-preview`) |\\n| `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource` | A resiliency review generated for a subscription workload (preview API `2025-05-01-preview`) |\\n| `AdvisorTriageResource` | A triage record tracking which recommendations have been reviewed (preview API `2025-05-01-preview`) |\\n| `AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource` | An individual recommendation within a triage session (preview API `2025-05-01-preview`) |\\n| `AdvisorScoreEntityResource` | The Advisor score for a subscription or workload |\\n| `AdvisorMetadataEntityResource` | Metadata describing recommendation categories and filter values |\\n\\nExtension methods on `SubscriptionResource` provide entry points for subscription-scoped operations such as listing all recommendations (`GetAdvisorRecommendations`), generating a fresh recommendation pass (`GenerateRecommendationAsync`), and listing suppressions (`GetAdvisorSuppressionContracts`).\\n```\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/README.md` — **edit**\\n\\nReplace the thin `Examples` section with proper snippet placeholders:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### List Advisor recommendations for a subscription\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Suppress a recommendation\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### List Advisor assessments (preview)\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\nAlso remove the standalone `## Documentation` section (merge its links into the `Getting started` section\\u0026#39;s `Authenticate the client` subsection) to align with the canonical README template.\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\n**File to create:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_HelloWorldAdvisor.cs`\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\n#nullable disable\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor.Models;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor.Samples\\n{\\n    public partial class Sample_HelloWorldAdvisor\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only validating compilation of examples\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task ListRecommendations()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:AdvisorListRecommendations\\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n\\n            string subscriptionId = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            ResourceIdentifier subscriptionResourceId = SubscriptionResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId);\\n            SubscriptionResource subscriptionResource = client.GetSubscriptionResource(subscriptionResourceId);\\n\\n            await foreach (AdvisorRecommendationResource recommendation in subscriptionResource.GetAdvisorRecommendationsAsync())\\n            {\\n                AdvisorRecommendationData data = recommendation.Data;\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Recommendation: {data.ShortDescription?.Solution} (category: {data.Category})\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only validating compilation of examples\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task SuppressRecommendation()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:AdvisorSuppressRecommendation\\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n\\n            // Obtain an existing recommendation resource (resourceUri and recommendationId come from listing)\\n            string resourceUri = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            string recommendationId = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            string suppressionName = \\u0026#34;mySuppress\\u0026#34;;\\n\\n            ResourceIdentifier recommendationId_ = AdvisorRecommendationResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(resourceUri, recommendationId);\\n            AdvisorRecommendationResource recommendation = client.GetAdvisorRecommendationResource(recommendationId_);\\n\\n            AdvisorSuppressionContractCollection suppressions = recommendation.GetAdvisorSuppressionContracts();\\n            AdvisorSuppressionContractData suppressionData = new AdvisorSuppressionContractData\\n            {\\n                Ttl = \\u0026#34;1:00:00:00\\u0026#34;, // suppress for 1 day\\n            };\\n            ArmOperation result = await suppressions.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed, suppressionName, suppressionData);\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Suppression created: {result.Value.Data.Id}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nThe snippet names (`AdvisorListRecommendations`, `AdvisorSuppressRecommendation`) must exactly match the placeholder names added in the README above.\\n\\nFor the `AdvisorListAssessments` snippet, add a new method to a separate file `Sample_AdvisorAssessments.cs` (because `AdvisorAssessmentResource` is scoped to the new preview API version — check the generated collection parent type before wiring up).\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README at `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/README.md` must contain these sections in order:\\n\\n1. **Getting started** ✅ (present)\\n   - Install the package ✅\\n   - Prerequisites ✅\\n   - Authenticate the client ✅\\n2. **Key concepts** ⚠️ (present but only a link — needs resource descriptions per this issue)\\n3. **Examples** ⚠️ (present but only a link — needs inline `C# Snippet:` placeholders per this issue)\\n4. **Troubleshooting** ✅\\n5. **Next steps** ✅\\n6. **Contributing** ✅\\n\\nAdditionally, the non-standard `## Documentation` section should be removed and its links folded into `Getting started` or `Next steps` to match the canonical template (`sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md`).\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 advisor` — verifies that `#region Snippet:` tags are extracted and injected into README placeholder blocks; check `git diff` after to confirm README was updated\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 advisor` — regenerates public API listing files (no public API surface changed in this issue, but run to confirm baseline)\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/`\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt; [!TIP]\\n\\u0026gt; **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/`\\n**Triggered by:** PR #58230 by `@scbedd`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nThe package was upgraded to api-version `2025-05-01-preview`, introducing five new resource types:\\n\\n- `AdvisorAssessmentResource` / `AdvisorAssessmentCollection`\\n- `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource` / `AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection`\\n- `AdvisorTriageResource` / `AdvisorTriageCollection`\\n- `AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource` / `AdvisorTriageRecommendationCollection`\\n- `AdvisorScoreEntityResource` / `AdvisorScoreEntityCollection`\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- The README `Examples` section contains only a generic link (`(aka.ms/redacted) there are no inline code snippets demonstrating any of the package's resource types\\n- No sample test files exist for the five new resource types (`AdvisorAssessment`, `AdvisorResiliencyReview`, `AdvisorTriage`, `AdvisorTriageRecommendation`, `AdvisorScoreEntity`)\\n- The CHANGELOG entry for `1.0.0-beta.6 (Unreleased)` only says \\\"Upgraded api-version to 2025-05-01-preview\\\" without listing the new resource types by name\\n\\n\\u003cdetails\\u003e\\n\\u003csummary\\u003e\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\u003c/summary\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/CHANGELOG.md` — **edit**\\n\\nReplace the sparse `### Features Added` block under `1.0.0-beta.6 (Unreleased)` with an itemized list of new resource types:\\n\\n```markdown\\n### Features Added\\n\\n- Upgraded api-version to `2025-05-01-preview`.\\n- Added `AdvisorAssessmentResource` and `AdvisorAssessmentCollection` for managing Advisor assessments.\\n- Added `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource` and `AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection` for managing resiliency reviews.\\n- Added `AdvisorTriageResource` and `AdvisorTriageCollection` for managing triage sessions.\\n- Added `AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource` and `AdvisorTriageRecommendationCollection` for managing triage recommendations.\\n- Added `AdvisorScoreEntityResource` and `AdvisorScoreEntityCollection` for querying Advisor scores.\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate the following sample test files. Use the existing files in `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/` (e.g. `Sample_SuppressionContractCollection.cs`) as style references.\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorAssessmentCollection.cs` — **create**\\n\\nProvide a `[Test]` method that:\\n1. Creates an `ArmClient` using `DefaultAzureCredential`\\n2. Gets the default subscription via `client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync()`\\n3. Retrieves `AdvisorAssessmentCollection` via `subscription.GetAdvisorAssessments()`\\n4. Lists all assessments with `await foreach (AdvisorAssessmentResource item in collection.GetAllAsync())`\\n\\nWrap the core snippet in `#region Snippet:AdvisorGetAssessments` / `#endregion`.\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection.cs` — **create**\\n\\nSimilar pattern using `subscription.GetAdvisorResiliencyReviews()` and `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource`.  \\nSnippet region name: `AdvisorGetResiliencyReviews`.\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorTriageCollection.cs` — **create**\\n\\nSimilar pattern using `subscription.GetAdvisorTriages()` and `AdvisorTriageResource`.  \\nSnippet region name: `AdvisorGetTriages`.\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorScoreEntityCollection.cs` — **create**\\n\\nSimilar pattern using `subscription.GetAdvisorScoreEntities()` and `AdvisorScoreEntityResource`.  \\nSnippet region name: `AdvisorGetScoreEntities`.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/README.md` — **edit**\\n\\nThe current `## Examples` section only contains a generic link. Replace the body of that section with snippet placeholders for each new sample, then run `Update-Snippets.ps1` to inject the actual code.\\n\\nAdd these placeholders inside the `## Examples` section (after any existing content):\\n\\n````markdown\\n### List Advisor Assessments\\n\\n```C# Snippet:AdvisorGetAssessments\\n```\\n\\n### List Advisor Resiliency Reviews\\n\\n```C# Snippet:AdvisorGetResiliencyReviews\\n```\\n\\n### List Advisor Triage Sessions\\n\\n```C# Snippet:AdvisorGetTriages\\n```\\n\\n### List Advisor Score Entities\\n\\n```C# Snippet:AdvisorGetScoreEntities\\n```\\n````\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order from the repository root. Each must succeed before proceeding:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 advisor` — injects snippet code into README placeholders; verify with `git diff`\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 advisor` — regenerates public API listing files (no new public types were added in this change, but run to confirm)\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/`\\n\\n\\u003c/details\\u003e\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u003e
